final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input wr_en,  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory;  

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (wr_en) begin memory <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory ;
  end  
endmodule
